note: SATURATION CAP: cross+screen additive accumulator drives to unrecoverable (1,1,1) as trap hits stack. Measured hard-blowout (worst-case saturating locations, controlled per-location sweep): ~0% at opacity<=0.08, ~6% at 0.15, then 14% @0.20, 39% @0.30, 71% @0.45; threshold axis at op=0.15: 0% @<=0.05, 6% @0.08, 19% @0.12. Non-saturating regime = opacity<=0.15 AND threshold<=0.08 (default 0.15/0.05 is the clean corner). Enforced source-side in render_modes::render_direct_trap (DTS_SCREEN_*_CAP), gated to cross+screen; ring/lines/multiply don't saturate and are uncapped. soft_knee rolloff rescues the partial tier; the cap handles the rest. Forward-only.
